title: dactylorhiza × grandis
intro: Dactylorhiza × grandis is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Dactylorhiza maculata. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate blood flow and lower blood pressure due to its high content of flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza × grandis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of circulatory disorders, such as varicose veins and Raynaud's disease, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Dactylorhiza × grandis is often used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and infusions that promote cardiovascular health and well-being.
